instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices for 30 min|Grill chicken in oven at 200C for 15 min|Sauté onion garlic ginger in oil|Add tomato puree and simmer 10 min|Add cream and grilled chicken|Garnish with cilantro and serve with rice
Wash dal and pressure cook with turmeric and water for 15 min|Heat ghee and add cumin seeds|Add onion and sauté until golden|Add tomato and cook until soft|Add dal and mix well|Garnish with cilantro

Soak cashews in warm water 15 min|Blend tomato onion cashew into paste|Heat butter and oil|Sauté ginger garlic paste|Add blended paste and cook 10 min|Add spices and cream|Add cubed paneer and simmer 5 min
Cut potato and cauliflower into florets|Heat oil add cumin seeds|Sauté onion until translucent|Add tomato and spices|Add potato and cauliflower|Cover and cook on low heat 20 min|Garnish with cilantro
Soak rice 30 min|Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices|Fry onion until golden brown|Layer partially cooked rice and chicken|Add saffron milk mint cilantro|Seal and cook on dum for 25 min
Boil water with crushed ginger cardamom cinnamon cloves|Add tea leaves and simmer 2 min|Add milk and sugar|Bring to boil|Strain and serve hot
Soak rice and dal separately for 6 hours|Grind into smooth batter|Ferment overnight|Heat tawa spread thin layer of batter|Drizzle oil cook until crispy|Serve with chutney and sambar

Soak chickpeas overnight|Pressure cook chickpeas with tea bag|Sauté onion ginger garlic|Add tomato and chole masala|Add chickpeas and simmer|Knead dough with flour yogurt baking soda|Roll and deep fry bhature
Make dough with flour salt ajwain oil|Boil and mash potatoes|Sauté cumin peas ginger chili|Mix with potato and spices|Shape samosas fill with mixture|Deep fry until golden brown

Mix milk powder flour baking soda|Add ghee and milk to form soft dough|Shape into smooth balls|Make sugar syrup with cardamom and saffron|Fry balls on low heat until golden|Soak in warm sugar syrup 30 min
